---
title: "Demos"
---

Interactive demos live here as standalone static pages.

- [Parcel Map Demo](parcel-map/index.html)
- [Assessor Dashboard Demo: Information](assessor-dashboard/index.html)
- [Assessor Dashboard Demo: Maps](assessor-dashboard/maps.html)
- [Assessor Dashboard Demo: Graphs](assessor-dashboard/graphs.html)
- [Assessor Dashboard Demo: Tables](assessor-dashboard/tables.html)

Note: demos using `fetch()` must run through a local server. Use `quarto preview` (or any local static server) during development.
